events.description: Immersive traveling exhibition featuring life-sized animatronic dinosaurs roaring and moving throughout the gardens. Journey across prehistoric Earth discovering different time periods and creatures. Perfect for dinosaur-loving kids and paleontology enthusiasts.
events.event_name: Dinosaurs Around the World: Passport to Pangea
events.location: Lauritzen Gardens, 100 Bancroft Street, Omaha, NE

events.description: Annual strawberry celebration packed with fun activities for all ages. Pick your own fresh strawberries, enjoy farm-fresh treats, petting zoo, hayrides, and educational farm activities. Great early summer tradition for families.
events.event_name: Strawberry Festival at Nelson Produce Farm
events.location: Nelson Produce Farm, 10505 N 234 St, Valley, NE

events.description: Stage adaptation of Disney's beloved Frozen featuring beloved songs, magical ice effects, and heartwarming story of sisterhood and courage. Family-friendly theater production perfect for fans of the movie.
events.event_name: Disney's Frozen at The Rose Theater
events.location: The Rose Theater, 2001 Farnam St, Omaha, NE

events.description: Enchanting exhibition showcasing nearly 70 iconic Disney character costumes spanning five decades of Disney film and television. Step into the magic and see the costumes up close. Perfect for all ages and Disney fans.
events.event_name: Heroes & Villains: The Art of the Disney Costume
events.location: The Durham Museum, 801 South 10th Street, Omaha, NE

events.description: New state-of-the-art library with tons of free summer events including story time, coding workshops, maker classes, STEM activities, and community events. Perfect place for kids to explore, learn, and have fun.
events.location: Omaha Central Library, 515 South 15th Street, Omaha, NE

events.description: Interactive STEM learning center featuring hands-on science and technology exhibits. Kids explore engineering, physics, light, and innovation through play. Part of Omaha's Henry Doorly Zoo and Aquarium.
events.location: Kiewit Luminarium, 10805 Regency Parkway, Omaha, NE

events.description: Family-friendly petting zoo and farm activities where kids can interact with friendly animals including goats, sheep, alpacas, and more. Beautiful outdoor setting for wholesome family time and animal learning.
Soft play indoor facility with climbing structures, slides, ball pits, and sensory activities perfect for toddlers and preschoolers. Climate-controlled space ideal for rainy days and hot summers.
events.event_name: Chirpy's Play Cafe - Indoor Play Center
events.location: Chirpy's Play Cafe, Multiple Omaha Locations

events.description: 1,000-foot cable-stayed pedestrian bridge connecting Omaha to Council Bluffs with stunning views of the Missouri River. Perfect for family walks, biking, and scenic photos. Safe, accessible outdoor recreation.
events.event_name: Bob Kerrey Pedestrian Bridge - Walk & Recreation
events.location: Bob Kerrey Pedestrian Bridge, Old Market to Council Bluffs, IA

events.description: A family-friendly Black Arts & Cultural Festival honoring 161 years of freedom. Features local Black artists, entrepreneurs, entertainment, live music, food vendors, kids activities, and community celebration. Saturday June 20 main event at The Union for Contemporary Art 2-10 PM.
events.location: Multiple locations across Omaha (The Union for Contemporary Art, parks, etc.)

events.event_name: Mary Poppins at Hawks Mainstage Theatre
events.description: The beloved story of the practically perfect nanny who transforms the lives of the Banks family. With dazzling choreography, unforgettable songs, and heartwarming tale. A classic family musical perfect for all ages.
events.location: Hawks Mainstage Theatre, 6915 Cass St, Omaha, NE
